 259: def capabilities(config: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]:
 260:     delegate_path = Path(config.get("delegate_path", str(DELEGATE)))
 261:     delegate_hash = None
 262:     if delegate_path.exists():
 263:         delegate_hash = hashlib.sha256(delegate_path.read_bytes()).hexdigest()
 264:     return {
 265:         "adapter_version": VERSION,
 266:         "allowed_actions": config.get("allowed_actions", []),
 267:         "delegate_path": str(delegate_path),
 268:         "delegate_exists": delegate_path.exists(),
 269:         "delegate_sha256": delegate_hash,
 270:         "state_root": str(STATE_ROOT),
 271:         "config_path": str(CONFIG_PATH),
 272:         "supports_raw_shell": False,
 273:     }
 274: 
 275: 
 276: def write_result(request_id: str, record: dict[str, Any]) -> tuple[str, str]:
 277:     path = RESULTS_DIR / f"{request_id}.json"
 278:     data = json.dumps(redact(record), indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n"
 279:     path.write_text(data, encoding="utf-8")
 280:     digest = hashlib.sha256(data.encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()
 281:     return str(path), digest
 282:

 284: def write_audit(record: dict[str, Any]) -> None:
 285:     day = dt.datetime.now(dt.timezone.utc).strftime("%Y-%m-%d")
 286:     path = AUDIT_DIR / f"{day}.jsonl"
 287:     with path.open("a", encoding="utf-8") as handle:
 288:         handle.write(json.dumps(redact(record), ensure_ascii=False) + "\n")
